Hourglass Plain Nude Pink

items.name_cn:
『Balenciaga lique』
Hourglass Crocodile Green Small
Balenciaga's seasonal heavyweight Hourglass crocodile bag features a unique, iconic curved silhouette that stands out instantly. The smooth surface forms a crescent shape with a metal B-shaped pull ring. The calfskin texture is exquisite and full of character! Go for it, don't stop!! 🖤🖤🖤
Small size: 19x8x21cm

items.name_cn:
『Balenciaga』
New Arrival☀Balenciaga👉This season's heavy【Crocodile pattern black】hourglass bag, the unique arc shape is highly recognizable💗, it's eye-catching and super cool at first glance💘, the appearance presents a half-moon shape✨, with a metal B ring hanging down, the calf leather texture is also very touching and has a lot of style, daily necessities are carefully selected and versatile, this year's Balenciaga hourglass bag will definitely be a hit, elegant, exquisite, and unique, eye-catching at first glance, hard not to be noticed⚠😄, hand or crossbody looks amazing.😍 It is definitely the goddesses' favorite, of course I love it too! Can be salty or sweet, that's the effect. Capacity test: phone, wallet, powder, lipstick, power bank, keys, tissues, all fit easily, supports inspection. Size: 23-10-24cm
